title: Validate coverage remains >= 90%
summary: Verify test coverage stays at or above 90% after documentation and script alignment changes.
acceptance_criteria: Coverage remains at or above 90% after running the verification suite.
Any coverage regressions are identified with a brief note on cause.
Coverage validation aligns with the project’s verification workflow.

steps.description: Run the verification suite with coverage enabled.
Record coverage results and confirm the threshold is met.
Note any regressions and identify impacted areas if the threshold is not met.
